---
title: "Real Analysis for Modelers"
subtitle: "CORE-001 | Core Mathematics — Year 1"
description: "A rigorous treatment of real analysis with emphasis on the tools most essential for modeling: metric space theory, convergence, integration theory, and function spaces. Prepares the student for measure-theoretic probability and functional analysis."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Real Analysis for Modelers

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
